scope_goal: Restart this lane from current main with strict owned-path-only context and vault persistence hardening; prior branch state is reference-only and must not be promoted as-is.
tasks_completed: Hardened ContextBasketStore recovery so malformed basket payloads are quarantined, recoverable payloads are canonicalized, and rewritten state stays auditable.
Hardened ContextSetStore recovery so malformed context-set payloads are quarantined, recoverable payloads are canonicalized, and rewritten state stays auditable.
Hardened VaultService recovery so malformed vault state is recovered or rewritten safely while preserving the safe lock default.
Kept regression coverage in tests/unit/test_context_storage_recovery.py under the approved shared-test exception and kept the lane limited to compatibility-layer storage work.
roadmap_items: Milestone 1: Bootstrap Flow Stabilization - context basket and vault persistence hardening.
vision_capabilities: Capability 1: Local-first state and identity - project-scoped vault and context basket with safe recovery behavior.
kickoff_budget_note: Reset-required lane after ownership and repo-hygiene drift in the stale March 5 review generation.
approved_exception_note: Approved shared-file exception for tests/unit/test_context_storage_recovery.py to cover the vault recovery regression alongside the owned-path storage fix.
